title: Finalize and prepare application for production deployment

requirements.text: Review all frontend pages and components to ensure production readiness: verify all images load correctly, check that all forms validate properly, ensure error states display appropriate messages, and confirm all navigation flows work as expected
acceptanceCriteria: All customer-facing pages (Home, Services, Gallery, Testimonials, Delivery Info, Quotation Request, Quotation Confirmation) load without errors
All admin pages (Dashboard, Login, User Management, Project Management, Chat Management, Quotation Management, Logo Management) function correctly when authenticated
Form validation works on QuotationRequestPage and SubmitReviewPage
Bottom navigation bar is functional on all customer pages
Chat widget opens and allows message submission
Admin login button is visible at the bottom of the app

requirements.text: Verify all backend actor methods are functioning correctly: test quotation creation and management flows, confirm admin authentication (email/password and biometric) works, validate project CRUD operations, ensure chat message storage and retrieval works, and verify review submission and filtering
acceptanceCriteria: Quotation requests can be created, viewed, and managed by admins
Admin users can authenticate using email/password or biometric methods
Projects can be added, edited, and deleted by admins
Chat messages are stored and retrievable by both customers and admins
Reviews can be submitted and filtered by rating
User profiles are created and updated correctly
Company logo and office location can be set and retrieved

requirements.text: Optimize application performance for production: ensure all images are appropriately sized and compressed, verify React Query caching strategies are working efficiently, confirm lazy loading is implemented where appropriate, and check that bundle sizes are reasonable
acceptanceCriteria: Images load efficiently without blocking page render
React Query queries use appropriate staleTime and cacheTime settings
Page transitions are smooth with swipe navigation
Pull-to-refresh functionality works without lag
Skeleton loading states display before data loads

requirements.text: Ensure mobile app-like experience is consistent across all devices: verify bottom navigation works on different screen sizes, confirm haptic feedback triggers on supported devices, test touch targets meet minimum 44x44px requirements, and validate that all interactive elements are accessible via touch
acceptanceCriteria: Bottom navigation bar is fixed and visible on all customer pages
Haptic feedback triggers on button taps, form submissions, and navigation actions
All buttons and interactive elements meet minimum touch target size
Swipe gestures work smoothly for page navigation
Chat widget opens as full-screen modal from bottom navigation

requirements.text: Configure production environment settings: ensure canister IDs are correctly set for mainnet deployment, verify Internet Identity integration uses production endpoints, confirm all API calls use production actor endpoints, and validate that error logging is appropriate for production
acceptanceCriteria: Canister IDs are configured for mainnet deployment
Internet Identity provider uses production settings
All backend actor calls reference correct production canisters
Error messages are user-friendly and do not expose sensitive information
Console logs are minimized or removed for production

constraints: Do not modify the backend data model or actor structure
Do not change authentication flows or access control logic
Preserve all existing features and functionality
Maintain mobile-first UI design and bottom navigation pattern
nonGoals: Adding new features or functionality beyond what exists
